2605.10867.title: BEACON: A Multimodal Dataset for Learning Behavioral Fingerprints from Gameplay Data
2605.10867.paper_summary: Continuous authentication in high-stakes digital environments requires datasets with fine-grained behavioral signals under realistic cognitive and motor demands. But current benchmarks are often limited by small scale, unimodal sensing or lack of synchronised environmental context. To address this gap, this paper introduces BEACON ( Behavioral Engine for Authentication \& Continuous Monitoring), a large-scale multimodal dataset that captures diverse skill tiers in competitive \textit{Valorant} gameplay. BEACON contains approximately 430 GB of synchronised modality data (461 GB total on-disk including auxiliary \textit{Valorant} configuration captures) from 79 sessions across 28 distinct players, estimated at 102.51 hours of active gameplay, including high-frequency mouse dynamics, keystroke events, network packet captures, screen recordings, hardware metadata, and in-game configuration context. BEACON leverages the high precision motor skills and high cognitive load that are inherent to tactical shooters, making it a rigorous stress test for the robustness of behavioral biometrics. The dataset allows for the study of continuous authentication, behavioral profiling, user drift and multimodal representation learning in a high-fidelity esports setting. The authors release the dataset and code on Hugging Face and GitHub to create a reproducible benchmark for evaluating next-generation behavioral fingerprinting and security models
2605.10867.paper_summary_zh: 持續驗證在高風險的數位環境中需要具備在現實的認知和運動需求下的細緻行為信號數據集。<lb/>但目前的基準常常受到小規模、單一模式感測或缺乏同步環境背景的限制。<lb/>為了解決這一缺口，本文介紹了BEACON（行為引擎用於身份驗證與持續監控），這是一個大型多模態數據集，捕捉了競技《Valorant》遊戲中的多樣技能層級。<lb/>BEACON包含約430 GB的同步模態數據（總磁碟容量為461 GB，包括輔助的《Valorant》配置捕捉），來自28位不同玩家的79個會話，估計活躍遊玩時間為102.51小時，包括高頻率的滑鼠動態、鍵擊事件、網路封包捕捉、螢幕錄影、硬體元數據和遊戲內配置背景。<lb/>BEACON利用了戰術射擊遊戲固有的高精度運動技能和高認知負荷，成為行為生物識別穩健性的一次嚴格壓力測試。<lb/>該數據集允許在高保真電子競技環境中研究持續驗證、行為分析、用戶漂移和多模態表示學習。<lb/>作者在Hugging Face和GitHub上發布數據集和代碼，以創建一個可重複的基準，用於評估下一代行為指紋識別和安全模型。
2605.10867.author: Ishpuneet Singh et.al.
2605.10867.authors: Ishpuneet Singh, Gursmeep Kaur, Uday Pratap Singh Atwal, Guramrit Singh, Gurjot Singh, Maninder Singh
